channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meet the OpenAI Engineer Leading ChatGPT's Biggest Transformation Yet
item.description: Thibault Sottiaux helped make AI coding one of OpenAI’s fastest-growing businesses. Now he’s overseeing a sweeping overhaul of ChatGPT.

item.title: The great AI Irony: China cracks down on Western models while US companies flock to DeepSeek
item.description: China is taking a hard-hitting approach to foreign AI and chipmakers, even as Western nations continue to embrace DeepSeek as a cheaper alternative

item.title: How to watch South Korea vs Czechia: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch South Korea vs Czechia for free online and from anywhere in Group A of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Massive Effigy of Elon Musk Raised Over Times Square to Protest Grok
item.description: Activists raised a 40-foot-tall inflatable Elon Musk in Manhattan to draw attention to the risk he allegedly poses to investors.

item.title: A US Army Apache helicopter went down near the Strait of Hormuz — an uncrewed drone boat made history by saving its crew
item.description: A US Navy drone boat rescued two Apache helicopter crew members near the Strait of Hormuz in a historic first.

item.title: SpaceX IPO update: Latest SPCX stock price, trading start time for closely watched Nasdaq debut
item.description: Elon Musk’s rocket company is in its final countdown, and the anticipation is hitting a fever pitch from Wall Street to Main Street. From Wall Street to Main Street, Elon Musk’s hotly anticipated SpaceX initial public offering (IPO) tomorrow has hit a fever-pitch with anyone, and everyone, buzzing about it in superlatives: Blockbuster. Record-breaking. Earth-shattering, Blastoff IPO....

item.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
item.description: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

item.title: El Niño is here—and it will ‘pour fuel on the fire of a warming world’
item.description: NOAA scientists say the climate pattern is likely to be one of the strongest on record. It could lead to drought, floods, fires, and more. El Niño is officially here—and it could be one of the strongest in our National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration’s historic record.

item.title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
item.description: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.

item.title: The top 3 secrets of innovation that nobody talks about
item.description: It requires discipline and a willingness to take risks. “Innovation” is starting to become a buzzword. From keynote speeches to strategic plans, we hear the word thrown around so often that it now risks losing its meaning. If you were to ask 10 executives to define innovation, you’ll get 10 different answers, most of them vague and unhelpful.

item.title: All of Apples iPads are on sale ahead of Prime Day, but were waiting for bigger savings
item.description: Prime Day is June 23 to 26, but early deals are here. We rounded up the best deals on Apple iPads to shop ahead of the sale.

item.title: La batterie solide arrive enfin chez Stellantis grâce à la Dodge Charger électrique vendue en Europe
item.description: Après des années de promesses et de démonstrations en laboratoire, la batterie lithium-métal semi-solide de Factorial tourne enfin dans un vrai véhicule Stellantis. Une étape concrète, mais qui reste une étape dans un chemin encore long. Un chemin que même les fabricants chinois les plus avancés peinent à voir le bout.

item.title: Get a monitor mount for under $20 with this exclusive discount code
item.description: Mashable readers get an exclusive code to save on the HUANUO FlowLift Pro Monitor Arm at Amazon.

item.title: Logitech’s awesome MX Master 3S mouse drops to under $100
item.description: The platform-agnostic Logitech MX Master 3S wireless mouse is discounted to $89.99 at Amazon ($30 off), matching the best price we’ve seen so far this year. While it may look like a somewhat ordinary mouse, it has a unique second scroll wheel near the left thumb that’s surprisingly useful for horizontal scrolling in spreadsheets. You […]

item.title: Here’s how much the 2026 World Cup will cost companies in lost employee productivity—the number is staggering
item.description: An estimated 5 billion people globally will watch the games, and some are already planning “sick days” to do so, says a new survey. The 2026 FIFA World Cup kicks off Thursday, June 11 to much fanfare, but one thing companies may not have considered is just how much it will cost them in lost productivity. And that number is staggering.

item.title: How to watch Canada vs. Bosnia and Herzegovina online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Canada vs. Bosnia and Herzegovina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.

item.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
item.description: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the risk of outright fraud.

item.title: J’ai essayé un cadre photo qui parle et c’était bizarre
item.description: C'est le concept le plus bizarre qu'il m'ait été donné de voir ces derniers mois. Un tableau qui parle.

item.title: Scientists call it a ‘tragic loss.’ Why the U.S. is shutting down a major ocean monitoring network
item.description: Scientists warn the loss of real-time ocean data could make it harder to track marine heat waves, changing currents, and extreme weather. The Ocean Observatories Initiative (OOI), a network that provides access to real-time ocean data that is relied on by scientists, researchers, and students, is being restructured with major cuts eliminating most of the project’s ocean monitoring efforts. ...

item.title: Bluesky launches group chats, as company shifts focus to community features
item.description: Bluesky's latest feature is group chats, arriving amid a shift in focus on building features for smaller communities.

item.title: Grok Is Still Hosting Sexualized Deepfakes of Famous Women
item.description: A WIRED investigation found dozens of “nudified” deepfake images and videos on Grok's website, including nonconsensual depictions of celebrities and at least one prominent US politician.

item.title: Are your hybrid meetings doing more harm than good? New survey finds many of us 'forget' about remote colleagues
item.description: New study reveals hybrid meetings can isolate remote workers due to outdated technology and meeting fatigue.

item.title: Is It a Super El Niño Year? It Could Turn the World’s Weather Upside Down
item.description: From a wet winter in the Southwest to fewer Atlantic hurricanes, this is what to expect as a potential super El Niño takes shape.
